name: web_search_exa
description: Search the web for any topic and get clean, ready-to-use content. Best for: Finding current information, news, facts, or answering questions about any topic. Returns: Clean text content from top search results, ready for LLM use.

numResults.description: Number of search results to return (must be a number, default: 8)

livecrawl.description: Live crawl mode - 'fallback': use live crawling as backup if cached content unavailable, 'preferred': prioritize live crawling (default: 'fallback')

type.description: Search type - 'auto': balanced search (default), 'fast': quick results

category.description: Filter results to a specific category

contextMaxCharacters.description: Maximum characters for context string optimized for LLMs (must be a number, default: 10000)

name: web_search_advanced_exa
description: Advanced web search with full control over filters, domains, dates, and content options. Best for specific filters like date ranges, domain restrictions, or category filters. Not recommended for simple searches.

query.description: Search query - can be a question, statement, or keywords

numResults.description: Number of results (must be a number, 1-100, default: 10)

category.description: Filter results to a specific category

includeDomains.description: Only include results from these domains

startPublishedDate.description: Only include results published after this date (ISO 8601: YYYY-MM-DD)

endPublishedDate.description: Only include results published before this date (ISO 8601: YYYY-MM-DD)

startCrawlDate.description: Only include results crawled after this date (ISO 8601: YYYY-MM-DD)

endCrawlDate.description: Only include results crawled before this date (ISO 8601: YYYY-MM-DD)

includeText.description: Only include results containing ALL of these text strings

excludeText.description: Exclude results containing ANY of these text strings

userLocation.description: ISO country code for geo-targeted results

additionalQueries.description: Additional query variations to expand search coverage

textMaxCharacters.description: Max characters for text extraction per result

livecrawlTimeout.description: Timeout for live crawl in milliseconds

subpages.description: Number of subpages to crawl from each result (1-10)

subpageTarget.description: Keywords to target when selecting subpages

name: get_code_context_exa
description: Find code examples, documentation, and programming solutions. Searches GitHub, Stack Overflow, and official docs. Best for: Any programming question - API usage, library examples, code snippets, debugging help. Returns: Relevant code and documentation, formatted for easy reading.

query.description: Search query to find relevant context for APIs, Libraries, and SDKs.

tokensNum.description: Number of tokens to return (1000-50000). Default is 5000 tokens.

name: company_research_exa
description: Research any company to get business information, news, and insights. Best for: Learning about a company's products, services, recent news, or industry position. Returns: Company information from trusted business sources.

companyName.description: Name of the company to research

numResults.description: Number of search results to return (default: 3)

name: crawling_exa
description: Get the full content of a specific webpage. Use when you have an exact URL. Best for: Extracting content from a known URL. Returns: Full text content and metadata from the page.

url.description: URL to crawl and extract content from

name: deep_researcher_start
description: Start an AI research agent that searches, reads, and writes a detailed report. Takes 15 seconds to 2 minutes.

instructions.description: Complex research question or detailed instructions for the AI researcher.

outputSchema.description: Optional JSON Schema for structured output.

name: deep_researcher_check
description: Check status and get results from a deep research task. Best for: Getting the research report after calling deep_researcher_start. Returns: Research report when complete, or status update if still running.

researchId.description: The research ID returned from deep_researcher_start tool

name: people_search_exa
description: Find people and their professional profiles. Best for: Finding professionals, executives, or anyone with a public profile. Returns: Profile information and links.

numResults.description: Number of profile results to return (default: 5)

name: linkedin_search_exa
description: DEPRECATED: This tool is deprecated. Please use 'people_search_exa' instead. This tool will be removed in a future version.

query.description: Search query for finding people on LinkedIn

numResults.description: Number of LinkedIn profile results to return (default: 5)

name: deep_search_exa
description: Deep search with automatic query expansion for thorough research. Generates multiple search variations to find results from multiple angles, then synthesizes a short answer with citations.

objective.description: Natural language description of what the web search is looking for.

search_queries.description: Optional list of keyword search queries related to the objective.

numResults.description: Number of search results to return (default: 8)

highlightMaxCharacters.description: Maximum characters for highlights per result (default: 4000)

systemPrompt.description: Instructions for how the deep search agent should process and format results (max 32000 chars).

structuredOutput.description: When true, returns a structured JSON response instead of markdown.
